items.headline: Castro's leadoff contributions paying off for Rockies

news_items.headline: Skubal's return still TBD after 3rd bullpen sessio...
news_items.summary: Tigers ace Tarik Skubal threw his third bullpen session since elbow surgery, with manager A.J. Hinch calling it a "great step." His return is still to be determined.

news_items.headline: Ohtani's 'superstar' night: leadoff HR, 5 scoreles...
news_items.summary: Shohei Ohtani returned to the lineup on his start day, hitting a leadoff home run then pitching five scoreless innings in the Dodgers' win over the Padres.

news_items.headline: Cubs' PCA calls pair of errors 'genuinely laughabl...
news_items.summary: Cubs center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong called his errors over the past two games "laughable" after allowing a ball to scoot under his glove in the second inning of Wednesday's 5-0 loss to the Brewers.

news_items.headline: Yesavage bests Schlittler in duel of young AL star...
news_items.summary: Trey Yesavage outpitched Cam Schlittler in a marquee matchup between young aces, and the Toronto Blue Jays edged the New York Yankees 2-1 on Wednesday night.

news_items.headline: Blue Jays' Berrios undergoes Tommy John surgery
news_items.summary: José Berríos underwent a full Tommy John surgery on his right elbow Wednesday, sidelining the veteran Blue Jays starter well into the 2027 season.

news_items.headline: Cubs' Cabrera exits start vs. Brewers with blister...
news_items.summary: Cubs starter Edward Cabrera left his outing Wednesday against the Brewers in the top of the fourth inning with a blister on his right middle finger.

news_items.headline: M's Crawford open to playing 3B with Emerson up
news_items.summary: Mariners shortstop J.P. Crawford said he recently had a conversation with manager Dan Wilson about changing positions after rookie Colt Emerson was promoted from Triple-A Tacoma.

news_items.headline: Tarik Skubal takes ‘great step’ in recovery from elbow surgery, throws third bullpen session
news_items.summary: Detroit Tigers ace Tarik Stubal threw another bullpen session, his third since his rehab program from elbow surgery began.

news_items.headline: What kind of starting pitcher could the Cubs acquire… right now?
Red Sox News & Links: Garrett Crochet, Trevor Story injury updates
news_items.summary: After throwing two simulated innings yesterday in a bullpen session, injured Red Sox ace Garrett Crochet has declared himself free of the shoulder inflammation that landed him on the IL. That’s great! What’s less great is that he also declared that his mechanics are out of whack. Crochet will take a few days off, throw […]
